name: composebastion
description: Multi-host Docker management console deployed with Docker Compose.

scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @composebastion/shared && npm run build --workspace @composebastion/api && npm run build --workspace @composebastion/agent && npm run build --workspace @composebastion/web
scripts.dev: concurrently -n shared,api,web -c cyan,green,magenta "npm run dev --workspace @composebastion/shared" "npm run dev --workspace @composebastion/api" "npm run dev --workspace @composebastion/web"
scripts.smoke:web: npm run build --workspace @composebastion/shared && npm run smoke --workspace @composebastion/web
scripts.test: npm run build --workspace @composebastion/shared && npm run test --workspaces --if-present
scripts.typecheck: npm run build --workspace @composebastion/shared && npm run typecheck --workspace @composebastion/api && npm run typecheck --workspace @composebastion/agent && npm run typecheck --workspace @composebastion/web
